description_long: This is a stone bust sculpture depicting a male figure dressed in a formal, high-collared uniform, mounted on a rectangular pedestal. The facial features are finely detailed, with a stern expression and neatly styled hair. The uniform includes visible epaulets and buttons, suggesting a military or official persona. The pedestal is robust and blocky, with the name 'NAKOBI' inscribed on the front. The back of the bust shows rougher, unfinished texturing, contrasting with the more refined front and sides. The entire sculpture has a monochromatic, light gray stone appearance, giving it a classical and dignified presence.
description: A detailed stone bust of a man in a formal uniform, mounted on a rectangular pedestal with an inscription. The sculpture is monochromatic and finely crafted, with a dignified and classical appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed face, uniform, and the 'NAKOBI' inscription on the pedestal.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the uniform's collar, and the depth of the bust.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rough, unfinished back of the bust and the full width of the pedestal.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face and the uniform, mirroring the left side but with subtle differences in texture.
attribute_location_context: No specific environmental context is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
